PkgConfigErrorc
Merge values from cffi config flags cfg2 to cf1
    Example:
        merge_flags({"libraries": ["one"]}, {"libraries": ["two"]})
        {"libraries": ["one", "two"]}
    z$cfg1[%r] should be a list of stringsz$cfg2[%r] should be a list of strings)

z5Calls pkg-config and returns the output if found

libname

boutZ
berrr
call
Return compiler line flags for FFI.set_source based on pkg-config output
    Usage
        ...
        ffibuilder.set_source("_foo", pkgconfig = ["libfoo", "libbar >= 1.8.3"])
    If pkg-config is installed on build machine, then arguments include_dirs,
    library_dirs, libraries, define_macros, extra_compile_args and
    extra_link_args are extended with an output of pkg-config for libfoo and
    libbar.
    Raises PkgConfigError in case the pkg-config call fails.
    c
startswith
<listcomp>L
zBflags_from_pkgconfig.<locals>.get_include_dirs.<locals>.<listcomp>
split
stringr
get_include_dirsK
z.flags_from_pkgconfig.<locals>.get_include_dirsc

get_library_dirsN
z.flags_from_pkgconfig.<locals>.get_library_dirsc
-lr(
z?flags_from_pkgconfig.<locals>.get_libraries.<locals>.<listcomp>r0
get_librariesQ
z+flags_from_pkgconfig.<locals>.get_librariesc
